description: Baseline: full validation pipeline (simple+fragments+complex)
Replace HashSet with Vec for parent_fragments in FieldSelectionMerging (cheaper clone, linear scan for small N)
Eliminate Path Vec allocation - members() never used by any rule, make Path Copy
Replace HashSet with Vec in fragment_spreads_must_not_form_cycles cycle detection
Refactor FieldSelectionMerging to use &mut Vec for error collection instead of returning intermediate Vecs
Eliminate HashSet allocation in FragmentSpreadIsPossible - use iterator-based overlap check with fast paths
Split cached_errors into HashMap validity_cache + BTreeMap errors — regression, extra HashMap overhead not worth it for small maps
Optimize duplicates() utility: skip BTreeMap allocation when no duplicates found (common case)
Replace HashMap with linear scan in RequiredArguments - argument lists are small, avoid allocation
Replace BTreeMap cached_errors with HashSet visited + Vec errors in FieldSelectionMerging — regression for small caches
Fast path in same_for_common_parents_by_name: skip HashMap grouping when all fields share same parent type
Optimize duplicates(): avoid intermediate (K,T) vec, compute key on-the-fly during dupe check
Replace 2x HashMap allocation in Arguments::equivalent with linear scan (bluejay-core) - O(n*m) faster for small N
Reuse Cache's fragment_definitions HashMap in FragmentSpreadTargetDefined instead of creating separate HashSet
Replace HashMap with Vec-based GroupedFields for field grouping — flat/regression on small queries, big win on fsm_128 (-9.1%)
Pre-allocate HashMap with_capacity(8) for grouped_fields — regression, over-allocates for small selection sets
Add visit_unknown_field to Visitor trait — FieldSelections now uses orchestrator's existing get() instead of redundant contains_field scan
Fix unused import warning in field_selections.rs
Hoist fields_definition() call outside selection loop — no measurable change, compiler already optimizes this
Add #[inline] hints to hot trait methods in bluejay-core — no measurable change, compiler already inlines
Re-run to confirm stability — no code changes, just benchmark noise (27.2k-27.7k range)
Separate HashSet for cycle detection in FieldSelectionMerging — extra HashSet overhead not worth avoiding sentinel BTreeMap insert
Stability check — no code changes, confirming ~27.5-28.4k range is stable
Fix: restore clean field_selection_merging.rs (discard artifacts from HashSet cycle detection experiment leaked into doc commits)
Use Rc<Vec> for parent_fragments in FieldContext — share across fields in same fragment scope, avoid per-field to_vec() allocation
